name: David Kustoff
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $657,518 for David Kustoff in U.S. House, TN-08. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
